ion"},{"inputs":[],"name":"usdc","outputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"","type":"address"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"}],"devdoc":{"custom:security-contact":"security@predictionprotocol.xyz","details":"Only addresses holding FACTORY_ADMIN_ROLE may deploy markets or         implementations. Salt uniqueness is enforced via saltToMarket mapping.","errors":{"AccessControlBadConfirmation()":[{"details":"The caller of a function is not the expected one. NOTE: Don't confuse with {AccessControlUnauthorizedAccount}."}],"AccessControlUnauthorizedAccount(address,bytes32)":[{"details":"The `account` is missing a role."}],"SaltAlreadyUsed(bytes32)":[{"params":{"salt":"The duplicate salt value"}}]},"events":{"ImplementationDeployed(address)":{"params":{"impl":"Address of the deployed implementation contract"}},"MarketDeployed(address,bytes32,string)":{"params":{"proxy":"Address of the deployed ERC1967Proxy","question":"The market question string","salt":"CREATE2 salt used"}},"RoleAdminChanged(bytes32,bytes32,bytes32)":{"details":"Emitted when `newAdminRole` is set as ``role``'s admin role, replacing `previousAdminRole` `DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE` is the starting admin for all roles, despite {RoleAdminChanged} not being emitted signaling this."},"RoleGranted(bytes32,address,address)":{"details":"Emitted when `account` is granted `role`. `sender` is the account that originated the contract call, an admin role bearer except when using {AccessControl-_setupRole}."},"RoleRevoked(bytes32,address,address)":{"details":"Emitted when `account` is revoked `role`. `sender` is the account that originated the contract call:   - if using `revokeRole`, it is the admin role bearer   - if using `renounceRole`, it is the role bearer (i.e. `account`)"}},"kind":"dev","methods":{"allMarketsLength()":{"returns":{"count":"Total markets deployed by this factory"}},"constructor":{"params":{"admin_":"Address receiving FACTORY_ADMIN_ROLE and DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE","feeVault_":"FeeVault (ERC-4626) address","marketAdmin_":"Admin forwarded to each proxy's initialize()","oracleAdapter_":"OracleAdapter address","outcomeToken_":"OutcomeToken (ERC-1155) address","usdc_":"USDC token address"}},"deployImplementation()":{"details":"Updates `implementation` to the newly deployed address.         The implementation must have its initializers disabled (done in         PredictionMarket constructor via _disableInitializers()).","returns":{"impl":"Address of the newly deployed implementation"}},"deployMarket(string,address,uint256,uint256,bytes32)":{"details":"The proxy is immediately initialised. The salt must be unique.         Reverts with NoImplementation if implementation == address(0).         Reverts with SaltAlreadyUsed if the salt has been used before.         The initializer is encoded as initialize(_usdc, _outcomeToken,         _feeVault, _oracleAdapter, _marketAdmin) from the factory's         stored addresses \u2014 the proxy then calls createMarket() to seed it.","params":{"question":"Market question string (emitted in MarketDeployed event for indexing)","salt":"Unique bytes32 for CREATE2 address derivation"},"returns":{"proxy":"  Address of the deployed ERC1967Proxy"}},"getRoleAdmin(bytes32)":{"details":"Returns the admin role that controls `role`. See {grantRole} and {revokeRole}. To change a role's admin, use {_setRoleAdmin}."},"grantRole(bytes32,address)":{"details":"Grants `role` to `account`. If `account` had not been already granted `role`, emits a {RoleGranted} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleGranted} event."},"hasRole(bytes32,address)":{"details":"Returns `true` if `account` has been granted `role`."},"predictMarketAddress(bytes32)":{"details":"Uses the standard CREATE2 formula:         address = keccak256(0xff ++ factory ++ salt ++ keccak256(initcode))[12:]","params":{"salt":"CREATE2 salt to predict for"},"returns":{"predicted":"The deterministic proxy address that would be deployed"}},"renounceRole(bytes32,address)":{"details":"Revokes `role` from the calling account. Roles are often managed via {grantRole} and {revokeRole}: this function's purpose is to provide a mechanism for accounts to lose their privileges if they are compromised (such as when a trusted device is misplaced). If the calling account had been revoked `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must be `callerConfirmation`. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event."},"revokeRole(bytes32,address)":{"details":"Revokes `role` from `account`. If `account` had been granted `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event."},"supportsInterface(bytes4)":{"details":"See {IERC165-supportsInterface}."}},"title":"MarketFactory","version":1},"userdoc":{"errors":{"NoImplementation()":[{"notice":"Reverts when no implementation has been deployed yet"}],"SaltAlreadyUsed(bytes32)":[{"notice":"Reverts when a salt has already been used for a prior deployment"}]},"events":{"ImplementationDeployed(address)":{"notice":"Emitted when a new PredictionMarket implementation is deployed"},"MarketDeployed(address,bytes32,string)":{"notice":"Emitted when a new market proxy is deployed"}},"kind":"user","methods":{"FACTORY_ADMIN_ROLE()":{"notice":"Role that permits deploying new market proxies and implementations"},"allMarkets(uint256)":{"notice":"Array of all deployed market proxy addresses in creation order"},"allMarketsLength()":{"notice":"Returns the number of deployed market proxies"},"constructor":{"notice":"Deploys MarketFactory and grants FACTORY_ADMIN_ROLE to admin"},"deployImplementation()":{"notice":"Deploys a new PredictionMarket implementation contract via CREATE"},"deployMarket(string,address,uint256,uint256,bytes32)":{"notice":"Deploys an ERC1967Proxy pointing to `implementation` via CREATE2"},"feeVault()":{"notice":"FeeVault address forwarded to every market proxy"},"implementation()":{"notice":"Current PredictionMarket implementation address used for new proxies"},"marketAdmin()":{"notice":"Admin address forwarded to every market proxy's initialize()"},"oracleAdapter()":{"notice":"OracleAdapter address forwarded to every market proxy"},"outcomeToken()":{"notice":"OutcomeToken address forwarded to every market proxy"},"predictMarketAddress(bytes32)":{"notice":"Predicts the CREATE2 address for a given salt without deploying"},"saltToMarket(bytes32)":{"notice":"Maps CREATE2 salt \u2192 deployed proxy address (address(0) if unused)"},"usdc()":{"notice":"USDC token address forwarded to every market proxy"}},"notice":"Deploys and tracks PredictionMarket proxy instances.         Uses CREATE2 for deterministic proxy addresses and regular CREATE         for implementation deployments. Each proxy is initialised immediately         after returns.count: Total markets deployed by this factory

params.marketAdmin_: Admin forwarded to each proxy's initialize()

deployImplementation().details: Updates `implementation` to the newly deployed address.         The implementation must have its initializers disabled (done in         PredictionMarket constructor via _disableInitializers()).

returns.impl: Address of the newly deployed implementation

deployMarket(string,address,uint256,uint.details: The proxy is immediately initialised. The salt must be unique.         Reverts with NoImplementation if implementation == address(0).         Reverts with SaltAlreadyUsed if the salt has been used before.         The initializer is encoded as initialize(_usdc, _outcomeToken,         _feeVault, _oracleAdapter, _marketAdmin) from the factory's         stored addresses — the proxy then calls createMarket() to seed it.

params.question: Market question string (emitted in MarketDeployed event for indexing)
params.salt: Unique bytes32 for CREATE2 address derivation

getRoleAdmin(bytes32).details: Returns the admin role that controls `role`. See {grantRole} and {revokeRole}. To change a role's admin, use {_setRoleAdmin}.

grantRole(bytes32,address).details: Grants `role` to `account`. If `account` had not been already granted `role`, emits a {RoleGranted} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleGranted} event.

predictMarketAddress(bytes32).details: Uses the standard CREATE2 formula:         address = keccak256(0xff ++ factory ++ salt ++ keccak256(initcode))[12:]

returns.predicted: The deterministic proxy address that would be deployed

renounceRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from the calling account. Roles are often managed via {grantRole} and {revokeRole}: this function's purpose is to provide a mechanism for accounts to lose their privileges if they are compromised (such as when a trusted device is misplaced). If the calling account had been revoked `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must be `callerConfirmation`. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

revokeRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from `account`. If `account` had been granted `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

FACTORY_ADMIN_ROLE().notice: Role that permits deploying new market proxies and implementations

allMarkets(uint256).notice: Array of all deployed market proxy addresses in creation order

allMarketsLength().notice: Returns the number of deployed market proxies

constructor.notice: Deploys MarketFactory and grants FACTORY_ADMIN_ROLE to admin

deployImplementation().notice: Deploys a new PredictionMarket implementation contract via CREATE

deployMarket(string,address,uint256,uint.notice: Deploys an ERC1967Proxy pointing to `implementation` via CREATE2

feeVault().notice: FeeVault address forwarded to every market proxy

implementation().notice: Current PredictionMarket implementation address used for new proxies

marketAdmin().notice: Admin address forwarded to every market proxy's initialize()

oracleAdapter().notice: OracleAdapter address forwarded to every market proxy

outcomeToken().notice: OutcomeToken address forwarded to every market proxy

predictMarketAddress(bytes32).notice: Predicts the CREATE2 address for a given salt without deploying

saltToMarket(bytes32).notice: Maps CREATE2 salt → deployed proxy address (address(0) if unused)

usdc().notice: USDC token address forwarded to every market proxy
